creator: oleg.cherkasov@linux.com
text:
I do not have the coredump, nevertheless it is easy to reproduce it seems.  I have got the same issue on few hosts.

It seems /etc/nsswitch.conf is not updated on samba416 install, at least the timestamp was ancient on my systems.  Those hosts were sequentially updated since FreeBSD 11.0 last few years, running 13.2 at the moment.

Here is the early discussion I had found and noticing the same issue with nss_wins.so:

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/sendmail-segmentation-fault-after-upgrade-from-12-3-to-13-1.87463/
